case_title: VERSOLA LEO R. VS MERRITT & ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERRITT & ASSOCIATES
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-26-1994, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,953.51 FILED BY VERSOLA LEO R. AS TO DEFENDANT MERRITT & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERSOLA LEO R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRITT & ASSOCIATES $2,953.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,998.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MERRITT & ASSOCIATES HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERSOLA LEO R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERRITT & ASSOCIATES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-02-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
